work_unit: cogalpha:deepseek-timeout — COGALPHA-01 derived fix from audit-2026-07-07-028
situation: DeepSeek HTTP client (llm.rs:108) uses reqwest::Client::new() with no timeout. A single stalled API call blocks the async runtime task indefinitely — DoS vector when LLM endpoint is unresponsive or network partitions. Audit finding COGALPHA-01 (high severity, route-fix).
action: Replace reqwest::Client::new() with ClientBuilder configured with 30s request timeout + 10s connect timeout. Builder fallback to Client::new() on build failure (defensive, logged via tracing::warn). Constants named DEEPSEEK_REQUEST_TIMEOUT / DEEPSEEK_CONNECT_TIMEOUT for visibility.
outcome_evidence: cargo check -p moni-cogalpha passed (Finished dev profile in 3.97s). opt-worktree.sh commit succeeded, branch auto/opt-cogalpha-1783357989 pushed to origin. Diff adds 2 const declarations + replaces Client::new() with ClientBuilder.timeout(30s).connect_timeout(10s).build() in DeepSeekLlmClient::new().
next_suggestion: 派生下一个 pending fix: MONI-API-001 (H, Monte Carlo n_sims unbounded CPU DoS, routes.rs:317) — 同 audit-2026-07-07-028 第二高优先级 route-fix

audit_findings.finding: reqwest::Client::new() has no timeout — indefinite hang on unresponsive DeepSeek API
audit_findings.remediation: Use ClientBuilder with explicit request + connect timeouts
